name: Shrimp Du Jonghe
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Medium shrimp, raw, shelled, deveined
2 cups boiling water mixed with 2 tbsp salt
2 tbsp fresh or frozen chives (1/4 tbsp crumbled leaf)
1 tsp minced fresh tarragon (or 1/4 tsp crumbled leaf tarragon)
1 tsp minced fresh marjoram (or 1/4 tsp crumbled leaf marjoram)
1 tsp minced fresh chervil (or 1/4 tsp crumbled leaf chervil)
1/2 cup unsalted butter, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Parboil the shrimp in the boiling salted water for 2 minutes, then drain well and reserve.
3. Toss the bread crumbs with the parsley, chives, tarragon, marjoram, chervil, garlic, and shallots.
4. Add the butter, lemon juice, sherry, salt, and pepper to the crumb mixture. Cream until a fairly smooth paste is formed.
5. Arrange the shrimp in a well-buttered 1-quart au gratin pan or shallow casserole. Spread the crumb mixture evenly on top.
6. Bake uncovered for about 25 minutes, until bubbly and lightly browned.
7. Serve with a tartly dressed crisp green salad.
